properties.headline: Special Weather Statement issued July 23 at 11:49AM MDT by NWS Pueblo CO
properties.description:
At 1149 AM MDT, Doppler radar was tracking a strong thunderstorm 11
miles northwest of Trinchera, or 17 miles east of Trinidad, moving
east at 15 mph.

HAZARD...Wind gusts up to 40 mph and pea size hail.

SOURCE...Radar indicated.

IMPACT...Gusty winds could knock down tree limbs and blow around
unsecured objects. Minor hail damage to vegetation is
possible.

Locations impacted include...
Trinchera.
properties.areaDesc: Trinidad Vicinity/Western Las Animas County Below 7500 Ft; Eastern Las Animas County
